risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year prior insurance history (2020–2024) across Workers Compensation, General Liability, and Commercial Property lines. Carriers: EMPLOYERS Insurance Group (2020), Chubb Limited (2021), Zurich Insurance Group (2022 — cancelled mid-term), Markel Corporation (2023), unknown/blank (2024). Annual claim counts: 2 (2020), 9 (2021), 6 (2022), 3 (2023), 11 (2024). Total documented combined premium for 2020–2023: $2,438,763.44. No loss ratios or individual claim details provided. A cancellation occurred in 2022. The 2024 year shows the highest claim count on record with no associated premium data.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history spans 2020–2024 across three lines (WC, GL, CP). Aggregate claim counts by year: 2020 (2), 2021 (9), 2022 (6), 2023 (3), 2024 (11). A mid-term cancellation occurred in 2022 under Zurich Insurance Group. No individual claim details, reserve amounts, or loss ratios are provided in the source data. The 2024 policy year lists 11 claims with no carrier name or premium, indicating an incomplete or in-progress record.
